items.title: Avalanche’s desktop fusion reactor delivers blistering-hot plasma
items.summary: Fusion power startup Avalanche Energy said its reactor prototype heated a plasma to over 10 million degrees C.

items.title: Why two SpaceX alumni are betting on solar and batteries to power the AI craze
items.summary: Ambrosia Energy wants to build power plants in less than 12 months while undercutting natural gas. It hopes to build gigawatts worth by 2030.
